title: Fit test - both earbuds are disconnected, not possible to start the Fit test [TO BE UPDATED]
scenario: Fit test cannot be started because both earbuds are disconnected, causing the Test button to be disabled in Tutorials, Onboarding, or User Guides.
steps: Open the app and navigate to Tutorials, Onboarding, or User Guides.
Attempt to start the Fit test.
expected: The Test button should be enabled and the Fit test should start.
